prompt:
Men's variation — a photorealistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph: a fit warm-skinned man in his early 30s sitting cross-legged on a low wood-and-cushion rooftop daybed at golden hour. Warm golden-pink sunset light wraps the entire scene. He lifts ONE dark sugar-dusted sea moss gummy CUBE between his thumb and index finger toward his slightly parted lips with a serene half-smile, mid-bite. He wears a fitted slate-blue henley with sleeves pushed up and warm-sand linen drawstring pants, dark stubble, hair tousled by the breeze, sun-warmed glow.

DIRECT WARM GOLDEN-HOUR SUNLIGHT FALLS FULLY on the JAR sitting on the daybed beside him — the sunlight visibly bathes the jar's front label, catching the teal/cyan and yellow accents, illuminating the curved black plastic side with a warm rim-light, the label glowing as the brightest most clearly-lit element in the lower frame. Beside the jar sits a small ceramic dish holding 5-6 more sugar-dusted gummy CUBES, also bathed in the same golden light. The jar must match the provided reference image — black plastic jar with teal/cyan and yellow accents, front label reading 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' in vertical teal strip, lid off, fully legible.

Background: a softly out-of-focus rooftop view — distant city skyline silhouetted against a warm sunset sky in soft pinks and oranges, a few potted olive trees in terra-cotta pots, a glimpse of a string-light strand, gentle warm haze. Cinematic depth.

Lighting: warm direct golden-hour sunlight from the upper-right wrapping BOTH the jar AND the man — sun catches his hair, cheek, and the jar's label in the same beam, integrating subject and product. Color grade is warm and luxurious with golden pink tones, editorial men's wellness-brand feel.

Framing: square 1:1, three-quarter view of the man seated, gummy held in the upper-third near his face, jar prominent in the lower-third on the daybed with direct sunlight on its label. Subject and product both clearly recognizable.

Style: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.0 shallow depth, natural unretouched skin texture and stubble, no AI artifacts, no extra fingers.
